title: How Not to Save the World
summary: While activist organizations are right to demand that governments do more to promote sustainable development, they are wrong to assume that only governments can deal with problems. Partnerships between governments, business, and communities are now key to a sustainable future.
body: Abstract While activist organizations are right to demand that governments do more to promote sustainable development, they are wrong to assume that only governments can deal with problems. Partnerships between governments, business, and communities are now key to a sustainable future. To view full text please click here (login may be required).
